name: Charlie Bisharat
abstract: Charlie Bisharat (born March 15, 1963) is an American violinist known as a member of Shadowfax and for his work in film and with other new age jazz artists.

concerts.label: The New York Pops: Doc Severinsen's El Ritmo de la Vida
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Lorraine Feather
about_quotes.evidence: And I might sing in unison with Charlie Bisharat, the violinist
about_quotes.doc_title: Lorraine Feather interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, March 22, 2023
